rationale.R1.2: The critique identifies a key logical inconsistency (the bias claim not being supported) and proposes a fix.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for the core claim about bias elimination, but doesn't delve into specific confidence levels for other claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope, with one drift: it focuses on the comparison to COMET/BLEURT without explicitly addressing whether JudgeMT covers the same active set of MT systems.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are identified; the critique highlights potential harm in overstating the results and generalizability.
rationale.RX.5: The critique doesn't discuss provenance or traceability, focusing instead on the content and validity of the claims.
